title: RBI (Non-Banking Financial Companies — Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Amendment Directions, 2026
description: <cite index="17-8,17-14">Amendment effective July 1, 2026 allowing borrower accounts classified as Standard to retain or regain that status upon implementation of resolution plan under Chapter VI-A, with NBFCs maintaining additional specific provisioning of 5% for each restructuring instance, capped at 100%, with interest income recognition on accrual basis for resolved accounts and cash basis for repeatedly restructured accounts.</cite>
